name: Full security posture review
prompt: 이 앱의 보안 상태를 전반적으로 평가해줘

assertions.text: Report contains 'Application Security Profile' section with all 6 fields (Application type, Tech stack, Authentication, Deployment, External services, Existing security controls)
Report contains 'Data Classification' table with Sensitivity column using exactly one of: RESTRICTED, CONFIDENTIAL, INTERNAL, PUBLIC
Report contains 'Compliance Matrix' section (either with framework entries or the 'No compliance frameworks applicable' statement)
Report contains 'Threat Register' table with STRIDE categories and risk_score = likelihood x impact calculation
Report contains 'Domain Scores' table with all 6 domains scored 0-10 and SPS calculated using weighted formula
Verdict matches SPS range: SECURE (>=8.0), ADEQUATE (6.0-7.9), AT RISK (4.0-5.9), CRITICAL (<4.0)
Remediation Roadmap is sorted by risk_score descending
Agent actually read project files (evidence: specific file paths from ai-config-sync referenced in findings)
